name: usePictureInPicture
description: Hook that provides Picture-in-Picture functionality for video elements
examples: const { open, supported, enter, exit, toggle } = usePictureInPicture(videoRef);
const { ref, open, supported, enter, exit, toggle } = usePictureInPicture();

parameters.name: options.onEnter
parameters.description: Callback when Picture-in-Picture mode is entered

source.source: * @param {() => void} [options.onEnter] Callback when Picture-in-Picture mode is entered
